final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI components arranged in a layered, hierarchical layout — web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls all visible
Subject: must include:
  - Web Dashboard panel
  - Mobile interface screen
  - Card components
  - Button components
  - Control widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a dark tech-environment backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-impact atmosphere with strong depth and layering — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction with high contrast and luminous accent highlights — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-morphism or layered-panel surface treatment — exact sheen and depth is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all listed UI component types; must convey strong sense of technological sophistication and visual hierarchy
Avoid:
